register.heading: Ready to transform how you work?
register.paragraph: Join the waitlist today. Be first to experience cleaner coordination, instant reporting, and seamless payments, all in one app.
register.formNote: No spam, ever. We'll only email you about the launch.
register.successParagraph: We'll be in touch the moment MyCleans launches.

meta.title: MyCleans - Creating Clean Connections
meta.description: Connecting professional cleaners and self-managing short-stay hosts to streamline communication, scheduling, reporting, invoicing and payments. MyCleans is an innovative web-based app free for cleaners and self-managing BnB hosts with only one property. A paid subscription is optional for premium features.

suggestModal.heading: Suggest a feature
suggestModal.intro: What would make MyCleans perfect for the way you work? We read every suggestion.
suggestModal.successParagraph: Thank you! Your suggestion is in. We genuinely use this feedback to prioritise what we build next.

hosts.heading: Operational clarity, without outsourced management.
hosts.paragraph: Self-managing hosts don't want a full property manager, but the hard parts still need to run smoothly. Get structured systems for coordination, reporting, and invoicing, without giving up control of your revenue.
hosts.imageAlt: A host and a professional cleaner high-five, with the MyCleans report screen above them

details.title: Find cleaners fast.
details.desc: Browse the directory and book an emergency clean in minutes.

details.title: Streamlined invoicing.
details.desc: Approve and pay in one click.

hero.heading: Creating clean connections.
hero.paragraph: Connecting professional cleaners and self-managing short-stay hosts to streamline communication, job scheduling, reporting, invoicing and payments.
hero.footnote: No spam. Be first to know the moment we launch.

card.heading: The Missing Piece
card.paragraph: There's a grey area between self-managing hosts and cleaners. Hosts need accurate reporting on guest cleanliness to leave correct reviews, and cleaners need clear schedules so they can plan their time efficiently.

footer.tagline: Creating clean connections between professional cleaners and self-managing BnB hosts.

features.heading: Your workflow, redesigned.
features.paragraph: Three features that make every clean seamless for both sides of the relationship.

cards.title: Instant Reports
cards.desc: Simple, clear reports based on a star rating by the cleaner so hosts know exactly how to review the last guest. Quick for the cleaner too, a few clicks, and it's sent.

cards.title: Easy Invoices
cards.desc: When a report is done, an invoice is auto generated for the cleaner to approve in one click. When the host approves, it's paid immediately.

cards.title: The Latest Tech
cards.desc: Using Stripe, Calendar Sync to Airbnb and VRBO and a searchable cleaner directory, MyCleans has you covered whether you are an owner, a host, or a cleaner.

cleaners.heading: Your business, your way.
checklist: MyCleans makes it super easy to report on the property condition with just a few simple yes/no questions and optional photos. Hosts will see exactly what you're dealing with before you've even left the property. You're not just cleaning, you're providing critical intelligence.
cleaners.imageAlt: A host and cleaner fist-bump, with the MyCleans invoice screen above them

details.title: Get paid faster
details.desc: Professional invoicing in-app, no more chasing payments.

details.title: Show your value
details.desc: Photos and instant condition reports prove your expertise.

details.title: Save time
details.desc: Streamlined coordination means less admin, more real work.

details.title: Find quality clients
details.desc: Connect with verified hosts on the directory who are looking for cleaning professionals.

details.title: Grow your business
details.desc: Build your portfolio and client base with ease.
